title: Szováthy Éva
actors: Katalin Karády, Pál Jávor, Ági Mednyánszky
plot: Vienna, 1848. The celebrated belle of the ball is Éva Szováthy, who at this evening finally decides in favor of her love for Doczy Lénard. History and fate, however, put up partitions between the Viennese courtier and the rebel ca...
